---
format: 
  html:
    link-external-icon: true
    link-external-newwindow: true
from: markdown+autolink_bare_uris
number-depth: 2
toc-depth: 2
date: last-modified
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
---

# Welcome {.unnumbered}

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="70%"}
Welcome to the **OUCRU Introduction to Medical Statistics 2026**. This course is designed to provide clinicians and researchers with the fundamental statistical tools required for medical research.

:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![](site_imgs/OUCRU.jpg){width="150px" fig-align="right"}

:::

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## 📅 Logistics & Schedule
* **Time:** 09:15 – 16:45 (UTC +7) daily
* **Lunch Break:** 12:30 – 13:30 (UTC +7)
* **Full Schedule:** [{{< fa file-pdf >}} Download Timetable](handouts/Agenda_StatCourse_23-27March2026.pdf)
* *Note: Lunch is provided for in-person attendees.*

:::

## Contributors {.unnumbered}

::: {layout-ncol=2}
* **Prof. Ronald Geskus**
* **Dr. Duc Du Hong**
* **Dr. Hoang Van Thuan**
* **Dr. Nguyen Lam Vuong**
* **Dr. Tran Thai Hung**

:::

---

# Pre-course Setup

::: {.callout-tip}
## 🛠️ Choose Your Environment
You have two ways to follow the course exercises:

1.  **Zero Setup (Recommended):** Use the [**Web-R**]{.badge .bg-primary} versions directly in your browser.
2.  **Local Setup:** If you prefer using **RStudio**, please complete the [{{< fa gear >}} Pre-course Setup Handout](handouts/precourse_setup.qmd){target="_blank"} before joining.

:::

# Course Topics

## Day 1: Descriptive and Exploratory Data Analysis 

### 🧑‍🏫 Lead instructors: Ronald and Duc

::: {.panel-tabset}

## ☀️ Morning: Descriptive Analysis

::: {layout-ncol=2}
#### {{< fa list-ul >}} Contents
1. Data characteristics & Variable types
2. Numerical & Graphical summaries
3. Intro to R and RStudio

#### {{< fa download >}} Materials
* **Lecture:** [{{< fa file-pdf >}} Slides](slides/day_1/1.SlidesDescriptives.pdf)
* **Exercises:**
    * [{{< fa desktop >}} Web-R version](handouts/day_1/Exercise1_Webr.html){target="_blank"}
    * [{{< fa code >}} RStudio version](handouts/day_1/ExerciseRStudio.html){target="_blank"} ([Script](handouts/day_1/ExerciseCode.R))
* **Answers:**

::: {=html}
    <div id="morning-answers">
      <button onclick="unlockMorning()" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">Click to unlock answers</button>
    </div>
:::
:::

## 🌤️ Afternoon: Exploratory Analysis

::: {layout-ncol=2}
#### {{< fa list-ul >}} Contents
1. (Baseline) tables
2. Graphs for categorical variables
3. Numeric variables by group
4. 2-variable numeric plots

#### {{< fa download >}} Materials
* **Lecture:** [{{< fa file-pdf >}} Slides](slides/day_1/2.SlidesEDA.pdf)
* **Exercises:**
    * [{{< fa desktop >}} Web-R version](handouts/day_1/ExerciseWebr-2.html){target="_blank"}
    * [{{< fa code >}} RStudio version](handouts/day_1/ExerciseRStudio-2.html){target="_blank"} ([Script](handouts/day_1/ExerciseCode-2.R))
* **Answers:**

::: {=html}
    <div id="afternoon-answers">
      <button onclick="unlockAfternoon()" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">Click to unlock answers</button>
    </div>

:::

:::

:::

<script>
function unlockMorning() {
  var password = prompt("Please enter the session code provided in class:");
  if (password === "OUCRU2026") {
    document.getElementById("morning-answers").innerHTML = 
      '<a href="handouts/day_1/ExerciseAnswers.html" class="btn btn-success btn-sm" target="_blank">RStudio Answers</a> ' +
      '<a href="handouts/day_1/ExerciseAnswers.pdf" class="btn btn-success btn-sm" target="_blank">PDF</a>';
  } else if (password !== null) {
    alert("Incorrect code.");
  }
}

function unlockAfternoon() {
  var password = prompt("Please enter the session code provided in class:");
  if (password === "OUCRU2026") {
    document.getElementById("afternoon-answers").innerHTML = 
      '<a href="handouts/day_1/ExerciseWebrAnswers-2.html" class="btn btn-success btn-sm" target="_blank">Web-R Answers</a> ' +
      '<a href="handouts/day_1/ExerciseAnswers-2.html" class="btn btn-success btn-sm" target="_blank">RStudio Answers</a>';
  } else if (password !== null) {
    alert("Incorrect code.");
  }
}
</script>

---
